title: epipactis tremolsii var. duriensis
intro: Epipactis tremolsii var. duriensis, also known as Duriensis Helleborine, is a variety of orchid that belongs to the Epipactis genus. It is primarily found in the Iberian Peninsula and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Spanish and Portuguese herbalism. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Duriensis Helleborine typically involves drying the plant material and infusing it in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
